## Summary

Replaces internal/technical terminology in the Story Ledger UI with author-friendly language.

**Changes:**
- **Review Gate buttons:** "This is wrong" → "Needs correction" / "Needs correction — explain"
- **Module 3 sublabel:** "Frozen canon" → "Locked for evaluation"
- **Module 4 heading:** "WAVE Handoff" → "Craft Diagnosis Handoff"
- **Module 4 locked description:** Stripped "WAVE Revision System™" — now says "craft diagnosis"
- **Terminal conditions:** Raw enum values → author-friendly labels (death → "Dies", departure → "Departs", disappearance → "Disappears", transformation → "Transformed", open → "Arc open", unresolved → "Arc unresolved")
- **Closure status:** Raw values → clean labels (unknown → "Not yet determined", ambiguous → "Ambiguous")
- **File header comments:** Updated to match new labels

## Scope

**Touches:**
- `components/ledger/StoryLedgerShell.tsx` — module labels, button text, headings, descriptions
- `components/ledger/StoryLedgerLayers.tsx` — terminal condition and closure status display labels

**Does NOT touch:**
- No extraction pipeline changes
- No prompt changes
- No reducer changes
- No scoring, report renderer, or Revise workbench changes
- No data model changes

## Branch Freshness (Never Behind)

Branch-Behind-Base: 0

## Risks & Anomalies

- Pure display-only changes — no data flow or logic affected
- Label maps use fallback (`rawValue.replace(/_/g, " ")`) for any unmapped values

---

No-Pipeline-Impact: Confirmed — UI label changes only, no pipeline code touched.
